# QA Plan: Sprint 42 — Release Kickoff: Content Wave 1 + Art Bible Sections 1–4 (B1 + B2 Start)

**Date:** 2026-06-20  
**Generated by:** team-qa + sprint-plan + verification-before-completion + c-sharp-devops-engineer (QA harness) + csharpexpert (S42-02 per sprint plan/kickoff)  
**Scope:** Must-have S42-01–S42-06 per sprint plan + release-enablement-scope-boundary-2026-06-20.md (B1 wave 1: Req 02/06/12/13/16/21 committed rows; B2 start: art bible §1–4; scenario/data replay-gated). **S42-02 blocks all waves (S42-03+).**  
**Engine:** Unity 6.3 LTS / .NET 8 headless; PlayMode proxies in `ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests`; harness via BalticReplayHarness + PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests.  
**Sprint file:** `production/sprints/sprint-42-release-kickoff-content-art-bible-w1.md`  
**Kickoff:** `production/agentic/sprint-42-parallel-kickoff-2026-06-20.md`  
**Trunk:** `main` @ post-S41 (c4d6e52 tip + S41 closeout; baseline 1226/1226)  
**Review mode:** Lean (per `production/review-mode.txt` — PR-SPRINT skipped; parallel domain agents; docs + content focus)  
**Authority:** `production/release-enablement-scope-boundary-2026-06-20.md` (post-gate, supersedes polish for Track B) + [`docs/reports/future-sprint-roadpmap.md`](../../docs/reports/future-sprint-roadpmap.md) §5, §9 + scope-expansion-decision-2026-06-20.md (APPROVED; S41 closeout PASS + human ack unblocks S42).  

**Scope compliance (enforced):** Strictly inside `release-enablement-scope-boundary-2026-06-20.md` (B1/B2 only; 13 committed tracker rows across S42+S43; art bible partial §1–4 in S42; scenario policy maint only **no production hash change**; `impact()` mandatory on Catalog/Platform symbols; extend-only CatalogWriteGate; ZERO DelegationBridge.cs; Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` immutable; ReplayGolden 6/6; C2 proxy 18/18+; GitNexus `impact()`/`detect_changes()`; every Track B artifact cites this boundary + committed row ID or B2 epic). S42-01 baseline + S42-02 QA plan required before S42-03+ dispatch. Test baseline ≥1226 (post-S41); closeout target ≥1226 (monotonic; no regression). S42-02 (this plan) blocks waves. Expanded gate matrix produced in S42-01.  

**S41 closeout reference (unblock):** `production/qa/smoke-sprint-41-closeout-2026-06-20.md` + `production/gate-checks/scope-expansion-decision-2026-06-20-S41-close.md` (user ack 2026-06-20: "I provide the ack" / "S41 closeout PASS"). Gates held: 1226/1226, Replay 6/6, proxy 18/18+, GitNexus up-to-date, ZERO Delegation, extend-only WriteGate. AAR/replay spike from S41 (`production/agentic/s41-aar-replay-scrub-spike.md`) feeds S42-04 replay-gated scenario wave (policy JSON maint only; Req17 scrub deferred to S43).  

**S42-01 baseline reference (completed / in progress per wave plan):** `production/qa/smoke-sprint-41-baseline-2026-06-20.md` (and S42-01 equivalent) — **PASS** (1226/1226 tests; ReplayGolden 6/6; C2 proxy 18/18; hash unchanged; GitNexus noted).

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|-------|------|-------------------------|------------------------------|
| S42-01 Re-baseline + expanded gate matrix — build/test ≥1226 (post-S41); GitNexus @ tip; ReplayGolden 6/6; cite new boundary | Integration | Full sln ≥1226 PASS; ReplayGoldenSuiteTests 6/6; PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests 18/18+; smoke doc; gate-matrix-track-b-*.md (S42-01); no baseline drift | Smoke doc + indexed commit + sprint-status counters (baseline PASS recorded); boundary citation check |
| S42-02 Sprint 42 QA plan — B1/B2 scope from release boundary + tracker; classifies Logic/Integration/etc.; blocks waves; incorporates AAR/replay from S41; smoke/closeout criteria; evidence reqs | Config/Data | None (meta; this document; verification-before-completion embedded; scope-check read) | Plan review + team sign-off **before** any waves (S42-03+); Evidence-Pack-QA compliance; superpowers patterns + csharpexpert test structure |
| S42-03 Content wave 1 — Catalog/Platform (first committed tracker rows per gate; Req 06/12/13/16/21/02 subsets; projection-side read-models; `impact()` mandatory) | Integration + Config/Data | Delegation + UnityAdapter projection tests (CatalogDependencyGraph, provenance/quarantine surfacing, loadout/magazine counts, tooltips, doctrine inheritance); proxy 18/18+ (append filters if UI); GitNexus `impact()` evidence pre-edit | Editor read-model legibility (headless primary); live magazine counts / FK graph surfacing; boundary + tracker row ID cites; impact logs |
| S42-04 Content wave 1 — Scenario/data (scenario packages, policy JSON maint; replay-gated; no prod hash change) | Logic + Integration | ReplayGolden 6/6 + `/replay-verify` on any delta (A/B + golden match); BalticReplayHarness (seeds 42/11/7/4242); order-log/fingerprint diffs; policy JSON schema validation in harness | Replay-gated verification (policy changes isolated fixtures only); S41 AAR spike cross-ref (order-log for future scrub/AAR; Req17 subset deferred); no hash bump evidence |
| S42-05 Art bible sections 1–4 — expand/refine `design/art/art-bible.md` (S42 3 agent-days; §1–4 + AegisTokens.uss or doc; gate matrix cross-ref) | Config/Data + Visual | N/A (doc + structure verification; GitNexus on UI tokens if USS) | Sections 1–4 complete per B2 scope in boundary; AD-ART-BIBLE lean cross-ref; USS recommendation documented or implemented; boundary cite |
| S42-06 Closeout — smoke, evidence, sprint-status; all gates PASS | Integration | Full sln + ReplayGolden 6/6 + GitNexus + proxy gates; smoke-sprint-42-closeout-*.md; boundary cites on all artifacts | Closeout smoke + no-regression audit on S42; sprint-status.yaml update; evidence pack refs (B1 rows + art bible); gate-check readiness |

**Classification note (per release phase + team-qa + scope-check patterns):** Types per story ACs + sprint plan + prior QA precedent (S39–S41) + release-enablement-scope-boundary. Baseline/closeout = Integration (gates, harness, replay, GitNexus, smoke). QA plan / art bible / tracker cites = Config/Data (docs, enumeration, verification). Content Catalog/Platform = Integration primary (projections/read-models + cross-system) + Config/Data (data rows, provenance). Scenario = Logic (harness/replay determinism) + Integration (policy + replay gate). Art = Config/Data (doc structure) + Visual (refinement). Mixed resolved to primary; all B1/B2 only. S42-02 (Config/Data) is the explicit wave blocker. Incorporates AAR/replay from S41 spike (read-only order-log projection focus; replay harness emphasis in S42-04).  

**Scope-check incorporation:** Per `.claude/skills/scope-check/scope-check/SKILL.md` read (original plan = release-boundary + S42 kickoff/plan; current = committed rows + art §1–4 + replay maint); net change tracked via boundary B1 tables (13 rows total); no creep into deferred (Req 01/05/07-11/20); cuts explicit (e.g. no scrub UI in S42). Verdict maintained PASS (within B1/B2; cites boundary + tracker). Re-run recommended post S42-03/04.

## Hard Gates (Release Enablement — mandatory every merge + exit; per boundary §7 + sprint-42 + S41 closeout carry)

- `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` — **≥1226** (post-S41 closeout baseline; monotonic growth; never regress)
- ReplayGolden **6/6** every sprint (engage, comms, classify, stale, spoof, readiness + isolated fixtures); intra-run A/B hash/fingerprint match; **S42-04 replay-gated**
- C2 headless proxy **18/18+** (`PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests`; maintain filters: PlayModeSmoke\|C2Selection\|OobTree\|LossesScoring\|BalticReplay\|FuelState\|AttackMenu\|PlatformImport\|Doctrine\|C2TopBar\|PlatformCatalogViewer\|PlatformComms\|PlatformLinkCatalog\|Graph* ; expand for S43 Req 03/04 if landed)
- Production Baltic world hash **`17144800277401907079`** immutable for v1.0 (except isolated golden fixture updates; Golden ADR + Producer + TD sign-off only)
- GitNexus **impact() before every symbol edit** (Catalog/Platform cluster CRITICAL per boundary); `detect_changes()` before commit; HIGH/CRITICAL warnings block without TD review
- **ZERO touch** `DelegationBridge.cs` (explicit ADR required to revoke)
- **Extend-only** `CatalogWriteGate` (scope ADR may revoke for specific B1 data rows; projection-side only)
- All S42 artifacts cite **`production/release-enablement-scope-boundary-2026-06-20.md`** + committed row ID (B1) or B2 epic ID + roadmap §5/§9
- **S42-02 plan + S42-01 baseline + smoke** required before S42-03+ waves
- Determinism audit carry (0 CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM from S41-04) + replay-verify before sim/delegation touches
- Evidence-Pack-QA + verification-before-completion sign-off (team-qa + c-sharp-devops-engineer)
- **Expanded gate matrix:** S42-01 produces `production/qa/gate-matrix-track-b-2026-06-20.md` (or dated); cross-ref in art bible

**Verification-before-completion pattern (embedded):** Pre-dispatch: sequential reads of 5+ manifests + all S42 artifacts first (plan/kickoff/boundary/scope-decision/S41 closeout/AAR spike/tracker); GitNexus status/impacts; c# cmds run (build/test/replay/proxy); cross-refs; chain-of-verification via re-reads before final. Superpowers: dispatching-parallel-agents harness (per S42 kickoff tracks); test-driven (RED/GREEN for any harness changes).

## Automated Tests Required (C# / .NET Harness Focus — c-sharp-devops-engineer + csharpexpert)

### S42-01 (baseline; re-execute per wave plan)
- Full sln + targeted: `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests`, `PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests`
- GitNexus index health (status post S41 re-index)
- Evidence: smoke doc + `production/qa/gate-matrix-track-b-*.md`
- Cmds (c-sharp-devops-engineer):
  ```
  export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH"
  dotnet restore ProjectAegis.sln
  dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln   # 0e/0w PASS
  dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal   # 6/6
  dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests" -v minimal  # 18/18
  node .gitnexus/run.cjs status  # ✅ up-to-date
  ```

### S42-03 (Content Catalog/Platform; projection/read-model focus; `impact()` mandatory pre-edit)
**Test file paths / harness (per S40/S34 precedent + boundary):**
- `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/Projection/*Catalog*` + `CatalogDependencyGraph*`
- `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Platform/PlatformCatalogViewerTests.cs`, `PlatformCommsTests`, `PlatformLinkCatalogTests`
- `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/Projection/*Loadout*` / `*Magazine*` / provenance / quarantine read-models
- UnityAdapter projection tests for tooltips (glossary), doctrine inheritance, live counts
- GitNexus `impact()` on Catalog/Platform symbols (e.g. `gitnexus__impact` pre-edit); `detect_changes()`

**What to test (csharpexpert patterns — test-driven verification):**
- Read-model projections match committed B1 tracker rows (dependency-graph FK edges, magazine counts from catalog, provenance surfacing)
- No CatalogWriteGate behavior expansion (extend-only)
- Proxy filters cover new surfacing (append if UI changes)
- Deterministic: injected catalog reader; no wall-clock in projection paths

**Edge cases:**
- Empty catalog / quarantine state
- Legacy vs new loadout rows (roundtrip parity)
- Cross-process replay hash unchanged

**Evidence requirements:** impact() logs, projection test PASS, editor legibility (headless), boundary cite.

### S42-04 (Content Scenario/data; replay-gated; AAR/replay from S41 incorporated)
**Test file paths / harness:**
- `tests/regression/replay-golden-*.txt` (isolated policy updates only)
- `src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/...` + `ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/...` (ReplayGolden, DeterministicDetectionLoopTests, etc.)
- `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/...` (PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests + BalticReplayHarness filters)
- Replay harness: `BalticReplayHarness.Run(scenario, seed, ticks)` (dotnet test --filter ~ReplayGolden)
- Policy JSON: `data/scenarios/baltic-patrol*.policy.json` validation in harness (no prod hash bump)

**What to test (csharpexpert + superpowers):**
- Seeded RNG only (`SeededRng`); A vs B match across fresh processes + vs golden (world hash + FINGERPRINT_SHA256 + order-log diffs)
- No wall-clock (`DateTime.Now`/UtcNow) in sim tick paths (presentation + ICatalogClock only)
- No unordered Dictionary/HashSet iteration or LINQ OrderBy-less in deterministic paths
- Pure functions of (observed state, traits, seed); order-log + checkpoint exports for AAR (read-only)
- `/replay-verify` skill on any fixture delta (A/B + golden match)
- GitNexus queries for RNG/tick pipeline/determinism symbols
- **AAR/replay from S41:** Incorporate `production/agentic/s41-aar-replay-scrub-spike.md` (read-only order-log projection + MessageLogProjection/Checkpoint focus); order-log canonical for hindsight-aar (aar-* banks) without mutating replay fingerprint (per Req 07/17 + GDD order-log-replay.md). Policy maint only; no scrub UI (S43).

**Edge cases:**
- Seed variations (42, 11, 7, 4242) across Baltic variants + delegation RNG
- Fixture-only changes (no prod hash bump)
- Cross-process reproducibility
- Policy delta isolated (e.g. baltic-patrol-*.policy.json)

**Evidence requirements:** replay reports + 6/6 PASS, GitNexus status, S41 AAR spike cross-ref in evidence, boundary cite (no hash change).

### S42-05 (Art bible)
- GitNexus `context()` / `query()` on `design/art/art-bible.md` + USS tokens if changed
- Doc structure verification (sections 1–4 complete); no runtime tests

### S42-01/06 (consolidation / closeout)
- Cross-ref all prior smoke/proxy/replay/perf reports + harness runs
- No new code; consolidation + index verification (test-evidence-review pattern)

**C# test structure recommendations (csharpexpert + superpowers test-driven + c-sharp-test-engineer skill):**
- `[Test]` / `[UnityTest]` for PlayMode (NUnit + Unity Test Framework)
- Seeded harness setup: `new SeededRng(seed); BalticReplayHarness.Run(scenario, seed, ticks)`
- Asserts: `worldHash == golden; orderLog.Diff(A, B) == empty; fingerprint match; Assert.AreEqual(expectedProjection, actual)`
- Fixtures isolated to `tests/regression/` or `src/...Tests/`
- Harness verification before manual: smoke-check skill + PlayMode filters
- EditMode preferred for pure logic (projections, policy eval, seeded RNG); PlayMode only for UI bind/lifecycle (C2 proxy)
- Deterministic: inject clock/RNG; no real I/O/network/DB; per-test setup/teardown; no shared mutable statics
- Superpowers: align with `production/superpowers-version.txt` (obra/superpowers@5.1.0) + `docs/engineering/superpowers-setup.md` (verification-before-completion, dispatching-parallel-agents, TDD RED/GREEN, worktrees for tracks); test-evidence-review skill on harness
- csharp-architect patterns: pure SeededRng static (UnitFloat/Mix); SimTickRunner fixed Clock + MixWorldHash; explicit Sort/Comparers; preserve fingerprints/replay hashes

## QA Plan Gate + Smoke + Closeout Criteria (per team-qa + boundary + sprint-42)

**S42-02 blocks S42-03+.** This document + S42-01 baseline satisfies S42-02 acceptance criteria (B1/B2 scope matrix from boundary + tracker, classification Logic/Integration/etc., blocks waves, AAR/replay S41 incorporation, smoke/closeout, evidence, superpowers + csharpexpert embedded, scope-check, links).

**Entry criteria (before waves):**
- S42-01 baseline PASS + smoke doc
- This QA plan reviewed/sign-off
- Scope gate + release boundary + S41 closeout ack recorded
- Worktrees per manifest; GitNexus impact discipline ready

**Smoke criteria (post waves, pre-closeout S42-06):**
- Full sln ≥1226 PASS (no regression)
- ReplayGolden 6/6 + replay-verify PASS (S42-04 emphasis)
- C2 proxy 18/18+
- GitNexus impact() logs + up-to-date (S42-03)
- All hard gates above
- Boundary cites + tracker row IDs on S42-03/04/05 artifacts
- Produce `smoke-sprint-42-closeout-*.md` + evidence

**Closeout criteria (S42-06):**
- All Must Have complete (S42-01–06)
- QA plan + smoke closeout PASS
- B1 wave 1 committed rows (per boundary tables + tracker update)
- Art bible §1–4 complete + cross-ref
- New boundary doc cited everywhere
- sprint-status.yaml updated (S42 complete)
- Evidence: smoke, replay reports, impact logs, art-bible diff, gate matrix
- **Verification-before-completion + Evidence-Pack-QA sign-off**
- S42 status: ready for S43 (B1 wave 2 + B2 complete)

**AC status for S42-02:** **MET** (plan produced with full matrix from boundary/tracker, classification, wave blocker explicit, AAR/replay from S41, gates/evidence/smoke/closeout criteria, superpowers patterns + csharpexpert test structure embedded, scope-check incorporation, links to S42 plan/kickoff/release-boundary/scope-decision/S41 closeout/AAR/tracker/prior QA/S41 smoke; harness patterns).
